payload.source_text: The pocket money tracker system allows children to claim pocket money tasks as they are completed throughout the week.
payload.input_material_ref: verification_inputs/The Pocket Money Tracker System v1.docx

payload.source_text: Parents can detail tasks that should be completed and the monetary amount earned for that task.
payload.input_material_ref: verification_inputs/The Pocket Money Tracker System v1.docx

payload.source_text: As a task is completed it is linked to the child that completed it.
payload.input_material_ref: verification_inputs/The Pocket Money Tracker System v1.docx

payload.source_text: The children should be able to see the available tasks and the tasks they have completed that week.
payload.input_material_ref: verification_inputs/The Pocket Money Tracker System v1.docx

payload.source_text: At the end of each week the children can see the total amount they have earned that week.
payload.input_material_ref: verification_inputs/The Pocket Money Tracker System v1.docx

payload.source_text: The Parents can also see a report of how much each child has earned and the tasks they completed so that they can provide the pocket money earned to each child.
payload.input_material_ref: verification_inputs/The Pocket Money Tracker System v1.docx

payload.source_text: At the start of the next week all tasks become available again to be claimed.
payload.input_material_ref: verification_inputs/The Pocket Money Tracker System v1.docx

payload.source_text: Historical task data shall be available.
payload.input_material_ref: verification_inputs/The Pocket Money Tracker System v1.docx

payload.source_text: The resulting system shall be able to operate on iOS 16, Android 9 and Windows 11 or later.
payload.input_material_ref: verification_inputs/The Pocket Money Tracker System v1.docx

read_witness.file_path: verification_inputs/The Pocket Money Tracker System v1.docx

payload.evaluated_scope: All input material in this project
